content:
A user got stuck in the wrong language after the last updates.
iPad 10 wifi 256 
101385595
Exiting and trying to change the language don't work.
Also tried Fix and reinstalling

Hello, I am a player enjoying the game from Korea.

As new characters are released frequently, I need to create and keep "Deep Clauses" (Secret Pacts) with various traits to match them. However, the current storage limit feels too restrictive, and it is difficult to constantly decompose items to make space.

If simply increasing the default limit is difficult, I suggest adding an option to expand the storage capacity using "Elixir" or the "Precipitate Exchange Currency."

Thank you for considering my suggestion.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Please increase the storage limit for Deep Clauses.
